extDesc.message: Auto-control HKUST Smart Power Meter AC — schedule AC on/off automatically
extDesc.description: 扩展描述，Chrome Web Store 显示

extActionTitle.description: 工具栏图标悬停提示文字

acLoading.description: 弹窗初始加载状态文字

acIdle.description: 定时未启用时的状态文字

acRunning.description: 冷气当前正在运行的状态文字

acStopped.description: 冷气当前已关闭的状态文字

acOff.description: 定时功能已关闭的状态文字

pwmSettings.description: 弹窗 PWM 设置区段标题

activeHoursLabel.description: PWM 运行时段启用的复选框标签

activeHoursWithin.description: 当前处于运行时段内的状态微标

activeHoursOutside.description: 当前处于运行时段外的状态微标

helpTooltip.description: header 右侧问号图标悬停提示

onMinutesLabel.description: 开启分钟数输入框标签

offMinutesLabel.description: 关闭分钟数输入框标签

scheduleHintDefault.message: Click "Timed On" to start the AC and cycle by ON/OFF minutes. Click "Timed Off" to stop the cycle and turn off the AC.
scheduleHintDefault.description: 间隔模式下的说明文字

scheduleHintClock.message: ON at odd hours (1/3/5...23) · OFF at even hours (0/2/4...22). Click "Timed On" to start immediately.
scheduleHintClock.description: 时钟模式下的说明文字

btnTimedOn.description: 定时开按钮文字（v0.5.0 后已弃用，保留兼容）

btnTimedOff.description: 定时关按钮文字（v0.5.0 后已弃用，保留兼容）

timerEnabled.message: 定时已开启 · 点击关闭
timerEnabled.description: 定时 toggle 打开时的标签

timerDisabled.message: 定时已关闭 · 点击开启
timerDisabled.description: 定时 toggle 关闭时的标签

timerEnabling.description: 定时 toggle 开启中过渡文字

timerDisabling.description: 定时 toggle 关闭中过渡文字

safetynetSet.message: 🔒 Page safety timer set; core PWM still managed by extension
safetynetSet.description: 页面定时器已设置的安全提示

safetynetNotSet.message: ℹ️ Page safety timer not set: $1; PWM cycle will continue
safetynetNotSet.description: 页面定时器未设置但有错误的提示。$1=错误原因

safetynetError.description: 页面定时器错误信息。$1=具体错误

countdownClock.description: 时钟模式倒计时显示。HTML格式。$1=小时数(两位数)，$2=动作(开启/关闭)

countdownInterval.description: 间隔模式倒计时显示。HTML格式。$1=动作(开启/关闭)，$2=剩余分钟数

countdownSoon.description: 倒计时即将到时的显示。$1=动作(开启/关闭)

statusClosing.description: 定时关操作中状态提示

statusClosedOK.description: 定时关成功且关机确认成功的状态提示

statusClosedNoConfirm.message: ⚠️ Timer stopped, but shutdown not confirmed — please turn off manually
statusClosedNoConfirm.description: 定时关成功但二次确认失败的状态提示

statusClosedNoResponse.message: ⚠️ Timer stopped, but shutdown command not confirmed
statusClosedNoResponse.description: 定时关但无确认结果的状态提示

statusOnOK.description: 定时开成功的状态提示

statusError.description: 更新设置失败的状态提示

diagnoseStorageRW.description: 诊断：storage 读写检查通过

diagnoseClockMode.description: 诊断：时钟模式显示前缀

diagnoseTriggerTime.description: 诊断：显示触发时间前缀

diagnosePwmTrigger.description: 诊断：闹钟触发时间前缀

diagnosePwmSync.message: ac-pwm synced with storage trigger time
diagnosePwmSync.description: 诊断：PWM 与 storage 同步检查

diagnoseBadgeRebuilt.description: 诊断：角标闹钟补建前缀

diagnoseTabOpen.description: 诊断：AC 页面已打开前缀

diagnoseAcReadable.description: 诊断：AC 状态可读前缀

diagnoseContentNoResponse.description: 诊断：content script 无响应前缀

diagnoseClockSync.description: 诊断：时钟模式同步前缀

diagnoseSWInitDone.message: SW init done (started $1s ago, init $2s ago)
diagnoseSWInitDone.description: 诊断：SW init 完成。$1=启动秒数，$2=init秒数

diagnosePopHealedSw.message: popup self-healed storage (SW details unavailable, functions OK)
diagnosePopHealedSw.description: 诊断：popup 已自愈接管提示

diagnoseGetSwNone.message: getSwStatus no response & popup not self-healed — please reload extension at edge://extensions
diagnoseGetSwNone.description: 诊断：SW 完全无响应且未自愈

diagnoseBuildTime.description: 诊断：构建时间戳。$1=时间字符串

badgeClockSoon.description: 时钟模式：即将切换状态时图标标题

badgeClockCountdown.description: 时钟模式：倒计时图标标题。$1=小时，$2=开启/关闭，$3=分钟

badgeIntervalSoon.description: 间隔模式：即将切换时图标标题。$1=开启/关闭

badgeIntervalCountdown.description: 间隔模式：倒计时图标标题。$1=冷气运行中/冷气已关闭，$2=分钟，$3=开启/关闭

contentTimeout.message: Timeout waiting for AC switch. Ensure page is fully loaded
contentTimeout.description: content.js: 等待开关超时错误

contentRetryExhausted.message: Tried 3 times, AC did not become $1
contentRetryExhausted.description: content.js: 重试耗尽错误。$1=目标状态

contentCrossDayLimit.message: Page timer only supports same-day; cross-day PWM will use extension alarms

contentNoInput.message: Could not find page timer input
contentNoInput.description: content.js: 找不到输入框错误

contentInputRejected.description: content.js: 输入验证失败。$1=时间值

bgPageTimerNoTab.message: AC page not open, cannot set page safety timer
bgPageTimerNoTab.description: background.js: 无页面时设置定时器失败

bgPageTimerCrossDay.message: Cross-day PWM active; page safety timer will be set after midnight

scheduleHintPinTab.message: 💡 请将 UST AC 页面在浏览器中固定标签页并保持开启，否则定时开关无法控制空调。
scheduleHintPinTab.description: 提醒用户固定 AC 标签页

versionMismatch.message: [AC-UST] Version mismatch: manifest=$1, source=$2. Please reload extension.
versionMismatch.description: 版本不一致的 console 警告

popupSelfHealFail.description: popup 自愈失败日志前缀
